subject: e-mail stinky
body:
U right about e-mail.  When it comes down to it we all  have to face our own 
"stuff".
Odd as it is, just know I am just a regular girl - just feeling  lonely (tho 
not alone) which is > sad.
I may not be like a lot of people you know . I will be your friend  and am 
proud to call you mine & ask nothing more .  That is  valuable.  Life proving  
everything your  "octopus"  represented.
Be well, marcia



**************Planning your summer road trip? Check out AOL Travel Guides.    
  (http://travel.aol.com/travel-guide/united-states?ncid=aoltrv00030000000016)
